ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Continued To Nov-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick, Esq. counsel for and with Julie Manley, Executor (both appearing separately by video conference).

The Court addresses the Order to Appear/Show Cause, noting Mr. Roddick's written response to the same. Mr. Roddick confirms the error and accepts sole responsibility for the same. The Court declines to sanction Mr. Roddick and takes the matter off calendar.

Turning to the status of the accounting, Mr. Roddick advises that he and his client have come to an understanding as to how the estate is to be administered and that they have somewhat reconciled. In that regard, Mr. Roddick advises that his Motion to be relieved as counsel, currently scheduled for July 11, 2023, can be taken off calendar.

After further discussion with counsel and Ms. Manley, the Court sets status for close of the estate for October 24, 2023 and takes the current matter off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick, Esq. counsel for and with Julie Manley, Executor (both appearing separately by video conference).

The Court addresses the Order to Appear/Show Cause, noting Mr. Roddick's written response to the same. Mr. Roddick confirms the error and accepts sole responsibility for the same. The Court declines to sanction Mr. Roddick and takes the matter off calendar.

Turning to the status of the accounting, Mr. Roddick advises that he and his client have come to an understanding as to how the estate is to be administered and that they have somewhat reconciled. In that regard, Mr. Roddick advises that his Motion to be relieved as counsel, currently scheduled for July 11, 2023, can be taken off calendar.

After further discussion with counsel and Ms. Manley, the Court sets status for close of the estate for October 24, 2023 and takes the current matter off calendar.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Continued To Jun-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Julie Manley (executor) and Robert Thomas Roddick (attorney) to appear on June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to show cause will be issued to Robert Thomas Roddick (attorney) to appear on June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Petition for approval of report on status of administration is continued to June 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Riddick, via ZOOM, for Julie Manley, via ZOOM, petitioner.

The court begins by confirming the correct spelling of the Petitioner's last name. The court waives the spelling defect. The court then points Mr. Riddick to the issue of the erroneous date on section II which has the date of the codicil not the date of signature on the lost will. Mr. Riddick confirms the correct date of signature. The court waives the erroneous date defect in the codicil in open court. The court then asks if anyone is appearing to object. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated Jun-19-2020 and Codicil dated Nov-17-2020 are admitted to probate. Julie Manley is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-12-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
